etymology.description: 艸(艸) (cǎo, "grass; plant") + 合(合) (hé, "combine") = combine the meanings suggesting something related to communication plants -> reply
etymology.interpretation: The character 荅(dá, "reply") combines the semantic component 艸(艸) (cǎo, "grass; plant"), indicating relation to plants or growth, with the phonetic component 合(合) (hé, "combine"), to convey the idea of a response or reply growing as an interaction or combination of information, much like how plants grow.
